title: CLI: Comment Commands
description: Walkthrough of CLI changes adding hlx comments list and hlx comments post commands.

steps.title: HTTP client: basePath parameter
steps.description: Added optional basePath to hxFetch options. Defaults to '/api/inspect' for backward compatibility. Comment commands use basePath: '/api'.

steps.title: Ticket ID resolution
steps.description: resolveTicketId checks --ticket flag first, then HELIX_TICKET_ID env var. Exits with clear error if neither is available.

steps.title: hlx comments list
steps.description: GET comments via /api path. Supports --helix-only (filter isHelixTagged) and --since (filter by date). Displays in [timestamp] Author [markers]: content format.

steps.title: hlx comments post
steps.description: POST comment via /api path. Always sets isHelixTagged: true. Collects message from positional args.

steps.title: CLI entry point: comments case
steps.description: Added 'comments' case to the switch router, importing runComments. Usage text updated with comment command descriptions.
